workspaceDescription: pdfme based report design, draft template management, and branded PDF preview workspace.
draftStorageSubtitle: This behavior is intentionally explicit at this stage
draftStorageHeadline: Report drafts are currently stored in browser localStorage.
draftStorageBody: Because backend report template tables and migrations are not defined yet, this screen does not pretend that there is live database persistence. The UI stores drafts locally; this behavior will change when a registry table is added later.
registrySubtitle: Initial report catalog and draft list
emptyRegistryDescription: The first reports will appear here as drafts.
emptyCapabilitiesDescription: Designer scope items are listed here.
noPreviewDescription: You can generate a preview from the designer toolbar.
